zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Hughes Sr於1443年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯利阿福德時，他的父親Sir John Hughes26歲，母親Elizabeth Sheffield24歲。他於1460年與Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham在英國林可爾史爾斯利阿福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭被列為justice of the law。他去世於1495年9月8日在英國林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Hughes Sr于1443年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯利阿福德时，他的父亲Sir John Hughes26岁，母亲Elizabeth Sheffield24岁。他于1460年与Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham在英国林可爾史爾斯利阿福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰被列为justice of the law。他去世于1495年9月8日在英国林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Hughes Sr was born in 1443, in Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir John Hughes, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Sheffield, was 24. He married Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham in 1460, in Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as justice of the law in England, United Kingdom. He died on 8 September 1495, in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Hughes Sr est né en 1443, à Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hughes, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sheffield, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham en 1460, à Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the law à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1495, à Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Hughes Sr 1443 in Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hughes 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Sheffield 24. Er hat 1460 in Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als justice of the law in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 8. September 1495 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hughes Sr è nato il nel 1443 nel Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Hughes, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Sheffield, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham nel 1460, nel Sleaford, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the law nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 8 settembre 1495, nel Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe,: 영국 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Hughes Sr(이)가 1443년 영국 링코실르 슬리퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hughes(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Sheffield(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1460년 영국 링코실르 슬리퍼드에서 Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 justice of the law이었다. 그는 1495년 9월 8일 영국 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hughes Sr nasceu em 1443, em Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hughes, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sheffield, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham em 1460, em Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como justice of the law em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1495, em Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Hughes Sr родился в 1443 г. в местности слифорд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hughes было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sheffield, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham в 1460 г. в местности слифорд, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии justice of the law в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 8 сентября 1495 г. в местности семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Hughes Sr nació en 1443, en Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Hughes, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Sheffield, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Berkeley of Wymondham en 1460, en Sleaford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era justice of the law en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1495, en Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
